svg.text: CodeNook — internal view (development plugin, feature profile)
Conductor dispatches sub-agents along the 11-phase pipeline; HITL gates pause for Human; memory layer learns from every phase
🚦 HITL gates (10 of 11 phases gated; only `implement` is gate-less)
🧠 Memory Layer — extracted post-phase, deduped via fuzzy-merge, indexed in index.yaml
